title: AFFORDABLE HOUSING - 211info
text: OUR JUST FUTURE AFFORDABLE HOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates 18 properties with affordable housing units throughout East Portland and Gresham. 10550 NE Halsey Street Portland, OR 97220 Eligibility: Varies by property but generally are income-based Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 548-0200 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 548-0200 Main phone Portland Office (503) 548-0252 Main phone Community Relations Main phone (503) 548-0200 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for a list of properties and contact information. Applications and inquiries for housing units are accepted directly through the property manager at each location. FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Low Cost Home Rental Listings Other Services Offered At This Location: DONOR SERVICES - DONATIONS AND VOLUNTEERING EMPLOYMENT - EMPLOYMENT SERVICES UTILITIES - CITY OF PORTLAND WATER DISCOUNT PROGRAM UTILITIES - ENERGY ASSISTANCE UTILITIES - ROCKWOOD WATER FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OUR JUST FUTURE
